title: Spectra
content:
# Spectra

Smart Personal Executive for Cognitive Tasks & Real-time Assistance.

A voice-activated AI assistant running across iPhone, browser, macOS terminal, and Android.

## Key Features
- Voice control via ElevenLabs TTS + Google STT
- Gemini Live native audio mode
- Cross-device memory and history sync
- Computer Use (browser automation)
- Apple Music playback
- Maps & navigation

## See Also
- [[person-juan]]
summary: Voice-activated AI assistant running across all platforms
